name: Mrs Fields White Chocolate Chip
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Grease cookie sheets.
3. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, beat together butter and sugars until fluffy.
4. Reduce mixer speed to low, add egg and vanilla extract, and mix until combined.
5. Gradually add flour, increasing the mixer speed and beating until just blended.
6. Stir in chopped macadamia nuts and white chocolate.
7. Drop by heaping tablespoonfuls onto prepared cookie sheets.
8. Bake for about 15 minutes or until edges are lightly browned and tops appear dry.
9. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet with a wire rack for about 5 minutes before transferring them to cool completely on a wire rack.
